title: Finding Ultra
author: Rich Roll
subline: Rejecting middle age, one plant-based mile at a time.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- A mountain profile / elevation chart for an ultra race. Starts low-left, climbs, drops, climbs again to a final peak. The summit is RED. -->
  <g transform="translate(0 1700)" fill="none">
    <g stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
      <path d="M 0 0 L 80 -20 L 160 -60 L 240 -180 L 320 -260 L 380 -240 L 440 -160 L 520 -180 L 600 -300 L 700 -400 L 780 -440 L 860 -360 L 920 -200 L 1000 -240 L 1080 -380 L 1180 -460 L 1260 -380 L 1340 -300 L 1440 -220 L 1520 -140 L 1600 -80"/>
    </g>
    <!-- The final climb is RED -->
    <path d="M 1080 -380 L 1180 -460 L 1260 -380" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
    <!-- The summit marker -->
    <circle cx="1180" cy="-460" r="10" fill="#fc1c46"/>
    <text x="1180" y="-500" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#fc1c46" letter-spacing="0.2em">SUMMIT</text>
    <!-- X axis line -->
    <line x1="0" y1="60" x2="1600" y2="60" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1"/>
    <g font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="13" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.2em">
      <text x="0" y="100">MILE 0</text>
      <text x="1600" y="100" text-anchor="end">MILE 100</text>
    </g>
    <text x="800" y="170" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.4em">ELEVATION PROFILE</text>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: An ultra marathon elevation profile: jagged gray line tracing mile-by-mile climbs and drops, with the final summit's last ascent rendered in red 3px and marked with a red dot + 'SUMMIT' label. The composition is the literal terrain an ultrarunner faces. Title 320px uppercase, weight 500, splits the page between header and the mountain.
